name: chatapp
description: Enterprise internal chat — root scripts for backend + desktop

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix desktop
scripts.setup: npm run setup:env && npm run install:all
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,desktop -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:desktop
